scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue,bgMagenta" "npm run dev -w merosadak-backend" "npm run dev -w merosadak-frontend"
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run merge -w merosadak-backend && npm run deploy -w merosadak-backend && cross-env VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://merosadak.banjays.workers.dev npm run build -w merosadak-frontend && firebase deploy --only hosting && powershell -Command "if (-not $env:CI) { git add .; git commit -m 'Auto-build'; git push origin main }"
scripts.build:skip-merge: npm run build -w merosadak-backend && npm run build -w merosadak-frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue,bgMagenta" "npm run start -w merosadak-backend" "npm run start -w merosadak-frontend"
